title: Hide and Seek
description: Turn your world in to a Hide and Seek Minigame
body:
Hide and Seek

Turn your world in to a Hide and Seek Minigame!

Press TAB (player list key) to join and start the game! If the start button can be clicked but doesn't start the game, it's likely due to this mod not being present on the server! This mod is currently incompatible with Sodium. ⚠️ There will be bugs! An update is in the works, but it will be a while until it's out publicly. Instructions on how to play can be found in the video below:
